ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size */,
  "size_status" TEXT /* Status of the size (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the size */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the size was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size in the region */,
  "conversion_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., body measurement, garment measurement) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of size chart (e.g., standard, plus-size, children's) */,
  "chart_status" TEXT /* Status of the size chart (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the size chart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (e.g., tops -> outerwear -> jackets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "brand_status" TEXT /* Status of the brand (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the brand */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the brand was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last password reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access log (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "change_status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_changes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback event */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating (1-5, where 1 is poor and 5 is excellent) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, responded, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
